---
title: "115: ACC standings with diffs"
date: "2024-10-29"
categories:
  - gtUtils
  - nanoplots
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Fetch data from cfbfastR

```{r load-data, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(cbbplotR)
library(rlang)

final_standings <- readRDS("conf_standings.RDS")

# saved this in a RDS file avoid fetching it each time 

# commenting out the code below, these uses existing code from the byc app
# https://github.com/gallochris/evdev-byc/blob/main/data/conference_standings.R

# fetch schedule 
# conf_sched <- cfbfastR::cfbd_game_info(year = 2024) |>
#  dplyr::filter(home_conference == away_conference) |>
#  dplyr::filter(!game_id %in% c("401636618", "401636864")) |>  
  # Arizona at Kansas St is not a conference game
  # Baylor and Utah also not a conference game *shakes fist at Big 12*
#  dplyr::mutate(conf = home_conference) |>
#  dplyr::select(game_id, 
#                season,
#                week,
#                conf,
#                home_team,
#                home_points,
#                away_team,
#                away_points)

# function to pivot data and get one row per opponent
# pivot_sched <- function(df) {
#  home_games <- df |>
#    dplyr::mutate(
#      team = home_team,
#      opponent = away_team,
#      points_for = home_points,
#      points_against = away_points,
#      differential = home_points - away_points
#    )
  
#  away_games <- df |>
#    dplyr::mutate(
#      team = away_team,
#      opponent = home_team,
#      points_for = away_points,
#      points_against = home_points,
#      differential = away_points - home_points
#    )
  
#  all_games <- dplyr::bind_rows(home_games, away_games) |>
#    dplyr::mutate(
#      status = dplyr::case_when(
#        is.na(points_for) | is.na(points_against) ~ "remaining",
#        .default = "played"
#      )
#    ) |>
#    dplyr::select(team, opponent, week, conf, status, points_for, points_against, differential) |>
#    dplyr::arrange(team, week)
  
#  return(all_games)
# }

# pivot_sched(conf_sched) -> sched_for_teams


# standings_with_win_pct <- conference_standings |> 
#  dplyr::mutate(conf_win_pct = conf_win / (conf_win + conf_loss)) |> 
#  dplyr::select(
#    conf, 
#    full_diff,
#    team,
#    conf_win,
#    conf_loss,
#    conf_win_pct
#  )

# played_win_pct <- sched_for_teams |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(standings_with_win_pct, by = c("opponent" = "team")) |>
#  dplyr::filter(status == "played") |>
#  dplyr::group_by(team) |>
#  dplyr::summarise(
#    played_win_pct = sum(conf_win) / (sum(conf_win) + sum(conf_loss)),
#    games_played = dplyr::n(),
#    diff_list = list(differential)
#  )

# remaining_win_pct <- sched_for_teams |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(standings_with_win_pct, by = c("opponent" = "team")) |>
#  dplyr::filter(status == "remaining") |>
#  dplyr::group_by(team) |>
#  dplyr::summarise(
#    remaining_win_pct = sum(conf_win) / (sum(conf_win) + sum(conf_loss)),
#    games_left = dplyr::n()
#  )

# combined_win_pct <-  sched_for_teams |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(standings_with_win_pct, by = c("opponent" = "team")) |>
#  dplyr::group_by(team) |>
#  dplyr::summarise(
#    combined_win_pct = sum(conf_win) / (sum(conf_win) + sum(conf_loss))
#  )


# final_standings <- standings_with_win_pct |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(played_win_pct, by = "team") |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(remaining_win_pct, by ="team") |> 
#  dplyr::left_join(combined_win_pct, by ="team") |> 
#  dplyr::select(
#    conf, 
#    team,
#    conf_win,
#    conf_loss,
#    conf_win_pct,
#    games_played,
#    played_win_pct,
#    games_left,
#    remaining_win_pct,
#    combined_win_pct,
#    full_diff,
#    diff_list
#  )

# saveRDS(final_standings, "conf_standings.RDS")

```

### GT table one

```{r gt-tbl, warning=FALSE}

custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa_conf/500/acc.png'
       style='height: 105px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>ACC standings through October 26 games</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Sorted by overall conference win percentage.<br> Table includes opponent win percentages and point differentials in league play.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

acc_standings <- final_standings |>
  dplyr::filter(conf == "ACC") |>
  dplyr::mutate(win_loss = paste0(conf_win, "-", conf_loss)) |>
  dplyr::relocate(win_loss, .before = conf_win) |>
  dplyr::add_row(
    diff_list = list(c(7, 42, 18)),
    full_diff = 67,
    team = "Notre Dame",
    win_loss = "3-0",
    conf_win_pct = 1.00,
    games_played = 3,
    played_win_pct = 0.4375,
    games_left = 2,
    remaining_win_pct = .250,
    combined_win_pct = .357,
    conf_win = 3,
    conf_loss = 0
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(-conf_win_pct, -games_played, -combined_win_pct, -full_diff) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    rank_order = dplyr::case_when(
      team == "Notre Dame" ~ max(dplyr::row_number()) + 1,  # Assign the highest rank
      TRUE ~ dplyr::row_number()  # Keep original row numbers for other rows
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(rank_order) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team, include_name = FALSE) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_hide(columns = c(conf, conf_win, conf_loss, rank_order)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |>
  gt::cols_nanoplot(
    columns = diff_list,
    autohide = TRUE,
    plot_type = "bar",
    after = "full_diff",
    new_col_label = "Trend",
    options = gt::nanoplot_options(
      data_bar_fill_color = "lightgreen",
      data_bar_negative_fill_color = "lightpink",
      data_bar_stroke_color = "#333333",
      show_data_area = FALSE,
    )
  ) |>
  gt::fmt(
    columns = c(full_diff),
    fns = function(x) {
      ifelse(x > 0, paste0("+", x), x)
    }
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = ends_with("win_pct"), decimals = 3) |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(team), align = "left") |>
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    conf_win_pct,
    domain = c(0, 1),
    format_type = "number",
    digits = 3,
    palette = c("#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000")
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    combined_win_pct,
    domain = c(0, 1),
    format_type = "number",
    digits = 3,
    palette = c("#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000")
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    conf_win_pct = list(heading = "ACC", subtitle = "Win %"),
    games_played = list(heading = "Games", subtitle = "Played"),
    played_win_pct = list(heading = "Win %", subtitle = "Played"),
    games_left = list(heading = "Games", subtitle = "Left"),
    remaining_win_pct = list(heading = "Win %", subtitle = "Remaining"),
    combined_win_pct = list(heading = "Win %", subtitle = "Combined"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    full_diff = "+/-",
    team = "",
    win_loss = "W-L",
    nanoplots = ""
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    full_diff,
    domain = c(-90, 120),
    format_type = "number",
    digits = 0,
    palette = c("lightpink", "lightgreen")
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(
    columns = c(full_diff, nanoplots),
    label = gt::html("Point Differentials")
  )  |>
  gt::tab_spanner(
    columns = c(
      games_played,
      played_win_pct,
      games_left,
      remaining_win_pct,
      combined_win_pct
    ),
    label = gt::html("Opponent Records")
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(
    columns = c(team, win_loss, conf_win_pct),
    label = gt::html("Conference Play")
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(conf_win_pct,
                                       combined_win_pct),
                           sides = "right",
                           color = "black") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data from {cfbfastR} and theme for {gtUtils}<br>
                ACC features 17 teams, plus Notre Dame plays five ACC opponents as part of its part-time membership. Irish not eligible for conference championship game.<br>
                The fifth tie breaker for the conference championship game is the winning percentage of conference opponents in conference games only.<br>
                <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart | October 28, 2024</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_spanners(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      weight = 850,
      size = gt::px(15)
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(10),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(rows = c(18),
                              columns = c(1:10),
                              fill = "#FFFFC5") |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(750))


gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  acc_standings,
  file = "acc_standings.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "#FFFDF5"
)

acc_standings
```

### GT table two: FEI progression

```{r gt-tbl-two}

# load as RDS
fei_ratings <- readRDS("fei-progress.RDS")


  fei_change_plot <- fei_ratings |> 
                    dplyr::select(category, pre_fei_ptile, range_list, 
                                  current_fei_ptile, team) |> 
  dplyr::group_by(category) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |> 
  gt::cols_nanoplot(
    columns = range_list,
    autohide = TRUE,
    plot_type = "line",
    before = "current_fei_ptile",
    new_col_label = "Progression",
    autoscale = TRUE,
    reference_line = .50,
    options = gt::nanoplot_options(
      data_area_fill_color = "lightgreen",
      data_line_stroke_color = "#9E9ECC",
      data_point_stroke_color = "floralwhite",
      data_point_fill_color = "#333333",
      data_line_type = "curved",
      reference_line_color = "#333333",
      show_data_area = TRUE,
      show_data_points = FALSE
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(-team), "center") |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(team), "left") |> 
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    pre_fei_ptile = list(heading = "Preseason", subtitle = "Percentile"),
    current_fei_ptile = list(heading = "Current", subtitle = "Percentile"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(team = "",
                 nanoplots = "Progression") |> 
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    pre_fei_ptile,
    domain = c(0, 1),
    format_type = "percent",
    digits = 1,
    palette = c("#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000")
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    current_fei_ptile,
    domain = c(0, 1),
    format_type = "percent",
    digits = 1,
    palette = c("#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000")
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_labels(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      weight = 850,
      size = gt::px(15)
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(10),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups(),
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        weight = 850,
        size = gt::px(16),
        color = "black",
        align = "right"
      ),
      gt::cell_fill(
        color = "#C5C5FF"
      )
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups(),
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        weight = 850,
        size = gt::px(16),
        color = "black",
        align = "right"
      ),
      gt::cell_fill(
        color = "#C5C5FF"
      )
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_labels(columns = gt::everything()),
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        weight = 650,
        size = gt::px(12),
        color = "#333333"
      )
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "FEI ratings progression from preseason to week 9",
    subtitle = gt::md("Uses the percentile from overall FEI ratings to show progression since
                      the start of the season. The dotted line is the 50th percentile.")
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom("#C5C5FF",
                        bar_height = 45,
                        img = "https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png",
                        text = gt::html("Data from bcftoys.com + theme from {gtUtils} <br> 
                                        Table by Chris at Bless your chart"),
                        img_width = 30, img_height = 30, text_size = 10, text_weight = "normal",
                        text_color = "black"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(450))
  
  gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  fei_change_plot,
  file = "fei_change_plot.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "#FFFDF5"
)
  
  fei_change_plot
```
